'''shayuwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:beachworm|beachworm]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-y-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beachworm|beachworm]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| shayuwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæyiwith|shæyiwith]] || [[word:shæyiwij|shæyiwij]] || [[word:shæyiwish|shæyiwish]] || [[word:shæyiwi|shæyiwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shayuyuwuth|shayuyuwuth]] || [[word:shayuyuwuj|shayuyuwuj]] || [[word:shayuyuwush|shayuyuwush]] || [[word:shayuyuwu|shayuyuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shayuwuth|shayuwuth]] || [[word:shayuwuj|shayuwuj]] || [[word:shayuwush|shayuwush]] || [[word:shayuwu|shayuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shayufwuth|shayufwuth]] || [[word:shayufwuj|shayufwuj]] || [[word:shayufwush|shayufwush]] || [[word:shayufwuf|shayufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shayuwuthu|shayuwuthu]] || [[word:shayuwuju|shayuwuju]] || [[word:shayuwushu|shayuwushu]] || [[word:shayuwuku|shayuwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shayuwuth|shayuwuth]] || [[word:shayuwuj|shayuwuj]] || [[word:shayuwush|shayuwush]] || [[word:shayuwu|shayuwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shayuwuthul|shayuwuthul]] || [[word:shayuwujul|shayuwujul]] || [[word:shayuwushul|shayuwushul]] || [[word:shayuwukul|shayuwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shayuwuthuthu|shayuwuthuthu]] || [[word:shayuwujuju|shayuwujuju]] || [[word:shayuwushushu|shayuwushushu]] || [[word:shayuwuku|shayuwuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shayuwuthun|shayuwuthun]] || [[word:shayuwujun|shayuwujun]] || [[word:shayuwushun|shayuwushun]] || [[word:shayuwukun|shayuwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shayuwuthuoro|shayuwuthuoro]] || [[word:shayuwujuoro|shayuwujuoro]] || [[word:shayuwushuoro|shayuwushuoro]] || [[word:shayuwukuoro|shayuwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
